findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "awsinspect" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
